qas.q: A HAZMAT employee is any person who:
What types penalties can result from not following HAZMAT rules?
qas.a: Civil or criminal, depending on the level of damage to health or property

qas.q: Which of the following modes are used to transport HAZMAT?
To pass a DD Form 626 inspection, the driver must provide:
Which of the following is NOT a requirement to pass a DD Form 626 inspection?
qas.a: Description of the type of HAZMAT loaded onto the vehicle

qas.q: What type of hazard class division is identified on the label?
What type of hazard is identified on the label?
What is the purpose of the compatibility letter for ammunition items?
qas.a: It's used to determine if different ammo can be shipped together.

qas.q: Compatibility Group
qas.a: A grouping of hazardous materials based on their similar characteristics (i.e., gas, liquid, solid)

qas.q: Hazard Class Division
qas.a: Specific hazards within a hazard class

qas.q: Hazard Class
qas.a: A grouping of materials that can be safely transported and stored together

qas.q: What is the NSN for the item on this MSDS?

Which label is appropriate for the material on this JHCS Data Sheet?

The 49 CFR HAZMAT Table is used for which types of HAZMAT communication?
qas.a: Shipping papers , Placards , Package marking and labeling

qas.q: What is the primary hazard for Nitric Acid, Red Fuming?

qas.a:
TOXIC; inhalation, ingestion or contact (skin, eyes) with vapors, dusts or substance may cause severe injury, burns or death.
Fire will produce irritating, corrosive and/or toxic gases.

qas.q: What is the Emergency Response Guidebook?
qas.a: A publication created for first responders to use during hazardous material emergencies.
